# Benign inputs that may superficially resemble attacks
# These should NOT trigger WAF blocking

# === Names with Apostrophes ===
O'Brien
O'Malley
D'Angelo
McDonald's
It's a beautiful day
John's car won't start
Mary's lamb

# === SQL-like Legitimate Text ===
select your favorite color from the dropdown
union of workers rallied at the square
drop the package at the front door
insert coin to continue
update your profile information
delete old files from your computer
We need to select all items from the list
The union members voted to approve the contract
Please drop off the delivery at door 3
Make sure to update your settings before continuing
grant access to the shared folder

# === HTML-like Content ===
Use <b>bold</b> for emphasis
The price is <$50
Income > $100K
a < b and b > c
3 < 5 is true
H&M store
AT&T wireless
Johnson & Johnson
Tom & Jerry

# === File Paths ===
/home/user/documents/report.pdf
C:\Users\john\Desktop\file.txt
/var/log/application.log
../images/logo.png
./config/settings.json

# === URLs ===
https://www.example.com/search?q=hello+world
http://localhost:3000/api/users
ftp://files.example.com/pub/readme.txt
https://example.com/path?page=1&sort=name

# === Email Addresses ===
user@example.com
john.doe@company.org
admin+test@gmail.com

# === Code Snippets in Documentation ===
Use alert() to show a message
The script runs automatically
function calculateTotal(items)
for i := 0; i < len(items); i++
if (count > 0 && status == "active")
password = input("Enter password: ")
config.set("timeout", 30)

# === Mathematical / Scientific Text ===
The result is 1=1 when x equals y
If a=b and b=c then a=c
SELECT model: choose between A or B
The OR gate outputs 1 when either input is 1
The AND gate requires both inputs to be 1

# === Business Text ===
Order #12345 was shipped
Invoice total: $1,234.56
Account balance: -$50.00
SSN format: XXX-XX-XXXX (masked)
Credit card: **** **** **** 1234
